description: Animates translating a 3D shape by a displacement vector (dx, dy, dz). Supports both g3d mode (creates a new translated shape with slide animation) and s3d mode (directly mutates the Three.js object position).
utility: Translate 3D shapes by a displacement vector with animation.

arguments.name: container
arguments.description: The 3D graph or space context (g3d for animation mode, s3d for direct mutation)

arguments.name: delta
arguments.type: vector3d | point3d | three numbers (dx, dy, dz)
arguments.description: The displacement vector or three coordinates for displacement

alternates.description: Translate shape by a vector's direction
Translate shape by coordinates given as a point3d
Translate shape by three separate displacement values

alternates.syntax: translate3d(S, shape, dx, dy, dz) or translate3d(S, shape, point3d(S,dx,dy,dz))

examples.scenario: Translate a vector by displacement values

examples.expression: S = s3d(at(4,20), 10, 10); g = group(); translate3d(S, g, 1, 0.5, 0)

examples.scenario: Translate using a vector as displacement
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(4,20), view(20, 20)); V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 3, 0, 0); D = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, 3); translate3d(G, V, D)
